target.title: fix(docker): bundle QA Lab runtime in the image
target.body:
## What was broken

`pnpm qa:lab:up` builds a Docker image and starts three services:

- `qa-mock-openai`
- `qa-lab`
- `openclaw-qa-gateway`

The QA Lab Docker path did not fully bundle the QA Lab runtime. The image build did not enable the private QA CLI when `qa-lab` was included, the generated gateway config did not allow and enable the `qa-lab` plugin, and the built QA Lab web UI was not copied into the runtime image.

That meant the Docker QA Lab stack could build or start without the same QA Lab runtime pieces that the local runner expects.

## How this fixes it

- The Docker build enables private QA build/runtime flags only when `qa-lab` is in `OPENCLAW_EXTENSIONS`.
- The Docker build runs `qa:lab:build` only when `qa-lab` is bundled.
- The built QA Lab web UI is copied into `dist/extensions/qa-lab/web/dist` before runtime assets are copied.
- The QA Docker compose harness sets the private QA CLI/config/state environment for the QA services.
- The generated QA gateway config allows and enables the `qa-lab` plugin.

## Docker proof

Ran on PR head `79d2aa6bf17a700e038430b43a2008c5131f30f9`, before the later test-only CI repair commits:

```sh
PATH="/Users/jmerhi/.local/share/fnm/node-versions/v22.21.0/installation/bin:$PATH" \
node --import tsx scripts/qa-lab-up.ts \
  --output-dir .artifacts/qa-docker-pr92087-proof-79d2aa6b
```

Result:

```text
QA docker dir: .artifacts/qa-docker-pr92087-proof-79d2aa6b
QA Lab UI: http://127.0.0.1:43124
Gateway UI: http://127.0.0.1:18789/
```

Compose services were healthy:

```text
qa-docker-pr92087-proof-79d2aa6b-openclaw-qa-gateway-1   Up (healthy)   127.0.0.1:18789->18789/tcp
qa-docker-pr92087-proof-79d2aa6b-qa-lab-1                Up (healthy)   127.0.0.1:43124->43123/tcp
qa-docker-pr92087-proof-79d2aa6b-qa-mock-openai-1        Up (healthy)
```

Health checks:

```sh
curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:43124/healthz
curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:18789/healthz
```

Both returned:

```json
{"ok":true,"status":"live"}
```

Cleanup completed:

```sh
docker compose -f .artifacts/qa-docker-pr92087-proof-79d2aa6b/docker-compose.qa.yml down --remove-orphans
```

## Latest-head verification

Latest pushed head: `6cc3478bb429a4050821ca3ea1118cfa32102d5f`.

Focused Docker/QA Lab tests:

```sh
PATH="/Users/jmerhi/.local/share/fnm/node-versions/v22.21.0/installation/bin:$PATH" \
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs \
  extensions/qa-lab/src/docker-harness.test.ts \
  extensions/qa-lab/src/qa-gateway-config.test.ts \
  src/dockerfile.test.ts
```

Passed: 2 Vitest shards, 3 files, 39 tests.

CI-repair tests for the two previously failing main-baseline shards:

```sh
PATH="/Users/jmerhi/.local/share/fnm/node-versions/v22.21.0/installation/bin:$PATH" \
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs \
  src/agents/anthropic-transport-stream.test.ts \
  src/agents/simple-completion-runtime.test.ts
```

Passed: 1 Vitest shard, 2 files, 85 tests.

GitHub checks on `6cc3478bb429a4050821ca3ea1118cfa32102d5f` are clean: `gh pr checks 92087 --repo openclaw/openclaw` reports the PR checks as pass/skip only, including the two jobs that previously failed:

```text
checks-node-agentic-agents-core-models    pass
checks-node-agentic-agents-core-runtime   pass
```
target.author: jesse-merhi
